templates.name: Classic Structure
templates.description: Standard 2-paragraph format with $BWS at start of middle section

opening.instruction: 1 sentence responding to KOL's tweet (5-20 words)

middle.instruction: Start with '$BWS [Product]:', then 1-2 sentences with specific features

templates.name: Feature List Structure
templates.description: Bullet point format showcasing 2-3 specific features

conclusion.instruction: Short value prop with $BWS mention (e.g., 'Real utility at microcap. $BWS')

examples.text:
Microcap season favors projects shipping real products over narratives.

X Bot delivers:
• Track 100+ KOLs with official X API analytics
• Identify bot farms through engagement patterns
• Measure authentic community ROI

Built by $BWS - microcap with revenue tools.

@BWSCommunity #gems #crypto https://docs.bws.ninja/telegram-bots/x-bot

templates.name: Delayed $BWS Mention
templates.description: Product mentioned first, $BWS cashtag appears later

middle.instruction: Start with '[Product name] [specific features].' Then '$BWS ships this...' or similar

templates.name: Problem-Solution Structure
templates.description: Present problem then solution with product

opening.instruction: State a problem or challenge (1-2 sentences)

middle.instruction: Start with 'The solution:' or 'Here's how:', then product from $BWS

conclusion.instruction: 1 sentence highlighting key benefit or impact

examples.text:
Most crypto projects can't prove their Twitter engagement is real - bots inflate metrics making due diligence impossible.

The answer: X Bot from $BWS uses official X API to track authentic KOL performance and spot bot farms.

Investors get verifiable data, not guesswork.

@BWSCommunity #crypto #analytics https://docs.bws.ninja/telegram-bots/x-bot

templates.name: Emoji-Enhanced Structure
templates.description: Uses 1-2 contextual emojis for visual variety

examples.text:
⚡ Supply shocks create opportunities in quality microcaps.

💡 Fan Game Cube from $BWS: sports fans own digital field sections as NFTs, earning points when real game events occur at their location.
🎯 Real monetization for clubs, expanding into iGaming.

@BWSCommunity #NFT #sports https://docs.bws.ninja/marketplace-solutions/bws.nft.gamecube

templates.name: Stat/Fact-Driven Structure
templates.description: Leads with data or concrete facts about product

middle.instruction: Lead with 'Consider this:' or stat, then $BWS product with specific metric/capability

templates.name: Question-Led Structure
templates.description: Opens with engaging question, then answers with product

opening.instruction: Engaging question related to tweet topic

examples.text:
How do you verify a project's community is real vs bot farms?

$BWS X Bot solves this: track KOL engagement metrics through official X API with bot detection via pattern analysis. Get verifiable data on community authenticity.

Crucial for microcap due diligence.

@BWSCommunity #crypto #DD https://docs.bws.ninja/telegram-bots/x-bot

metadata.notes: Weights should sum to 100 for proper distribution. Adjust based on engagement metrics over time.
